summary: TWO_COLUMN: CLT convergence rate for Uniform(0, 1) sums. LEFT axes with BLUE N(0, 1) reference + YELLOW histogram of 5000 standardized sums S_n·√(12/n)-adjusted, via always_redraw rebuilding bars for n=1, 2, 3, 5, 10, 30 driven by ValueTracker n_tr. RIGHT shows live KS distance decreasing vs 1/√n Berry-Esseen bound.
